task_description: Add a node type system (Task vs Concept nodes), a clone node feature where nodes can appear in multiple places while staying synced, and a three-panel split view for browsing clone nodes and their locations with navigation back to the main canvas.

verification.summary: Build passes cleanly. All features verified: nodeType system (task/concept), cloneNode with bidirectional propagation, three-panel split view with distinct dark backgrounds (#1a1a2e, #16213e, #0f3460), navigation from location panel to canvas with focus highlighting. Review issues fixed: orphaned clone cleanup on delete, duplicate/paste cloneSourceId reset, outline view concept node guards, clone badge flex positioning.
